Class GroupablePoint

java.lang.Object
com.amazingco.PickingPoint
com.amazingco.GroupablePoint
Direct Known Subclasses:
Kiosk, PackageLocker
public abstract class GroupablePoint extends PickingPoint
Amazingco GroupablePoints system. Copyright 2023, Amazingco. All rights reserved. A GroupablePoint requires an identifier, a GPS coordinate, an opening time and a capacity. GroupablePoint is an abstract class and a generalization of PackageLocker and Kiosk.

  • Constructor Details

    • GroupablePoint

      public GroupablePoint(String identifier, es.uva.inf.poo.maps.GPSCoordinate coordinates, LocalTime openingTime, Integer capacity)
      Constructor for GroupablePoint.
      Parameters:
      identifier - String representing the identifier of the groupable point
      coordinates - GPSCoordinate representing the location of the groupable point
      openingTime - LocalTime representing the opening time of the groupable point
      capacity - Integer representing the capacity of the groupable point

  • Method Details

    • setCapacity

      public abstract void setCapacity(Integer capacity)
      Sets the capacity of this groupable point.
      Parameters:
      capacity - Integer representing the container capacity

    • removePackage

      public abstract void removePackage(String packageCode, LocalDate deadline)
      Removes a package from this groupable point according to the provided package code and deadline date when it should be returned to the central office.
      Parameters:
      packageCode - String representing the package code
      deadline - LocalDate representing the deadline for return to the central office

    • getPackageInLocker

      public abstract Package getPackageInLocker(String packageCode)
      Returns the package stored in the container linked to the provided package code.
      Parameters:
      packageCode - String representing the package code
      Returns:
      the Package stored in the locker matching the given code, or null if not found

    • addPackage

      public abstract void addPackage(Package pkg, LocalDate deadline)
      Adds the given package to the container with an associated deadline date.
      Parameters:
      pkg - Package to be added to the container
      deadline - LocalDate representing the deadline

    • getCapacity

      public Integer getCapacity()
      Returns the capacity of this container.
      Returns:
      Integer representing the container capacity
